Also fix the pre-existing validator bug logged as DISC-36.
lesson: Every model rename in this project (school/0029 Department→Division, school/0032 SubjectKind→ImprovementType) is hand-authored as migrations.RenameModel BECAUSE makemigrations non-interactively produces a destructive drop/create — documented verbatim in those migrations' docstrings. A rename slice's plan must instruct 'hand-author the RenameModel mirroring 0032', not 'run makemigrations and STOP if not a rename'.

arc: Build the production realization of DEC-29's north star (the trio is its Django-service form). watch: Per DEC-57 + NORTH-STAR: do NOT reintroduce the byzantine layer (pi-workflows, .workshopping, dual render, the guards) -- the trio is plain Django reusing production primitives. Resilience is non-negotiable (user direction): NO run aborts on a per-section triviality (bounded retry + structured feedback -> degrade-to-Flag). The promotion gate stays DETERMINISTIC (_check_promotion_gates), never an LLM judge. Per-section: reason-then-format (decomposed), provider grammar-constrained for SHAPE + parsers for MEANING, catalogue-anchored generation with provenance (the citability invariant at generation). KPIs remain a standing exclusion (measurement tools = instruments/methods; numbers only inside a target criterion). The trio uses the PRODUCTION PromptTemplate rows (ai/migrations 0003-0027) directly -- the workshop snippets are not a separate live corpus. Every decision is checked against NORTH-STAR.md; a downstream disagreement with it is a defect to surface.
